inCity.toolbar.tooltip: Adjust road, rail, and water speeds
inCity.hint.title: Road • Rail • Water Speeds
inCity.hint.instruction: Click (or click and drag multiple) to select road, rail, or waterway segments
inCity.panel.title: Speed Limits
inCity.tooltips.applyTrain: Apply the New speed to every train track in the city.
inCity.tooltips.applySubway: Apply the New speed to every subway track in the city.
inCity.tooltips.currentSpeed: Current speed of the 1st segment selected.
inCity.tooltips.gameDefault.title: Game default speed
inCity.tooltips.gameDefault.line1: Default comes from prefab data, not sign art.
inCity.tooltips.gameDefault.line2: Road decals can be rounded or decorative.
inCity.tooltips.gameDefault.line3: So a road marked 25 or 35 may show a different real value.
inCity.tooltips.presetUnlimited.title: Unlimited preset
inCity.tooltips.presetUnlimited.line2: Matches the game's Unlimited highway policy.
inCity.tooltips.resetAll.title: Reset custom speeds
inCity.tooltips.resetAll.line1: Roads, Rails, Water, or All clears that type.
inCity.tooltips.resetAll.line2: Restores defaults when known. Save afterward.
inCity.tooltips.roadGroupApply.title: Apply to road group
inCity.tooltips.roadGroupApply.line1: Choose Small, Med, Large, or Hwy.
inCity.tooltips.roadGroups.small.title: Small roads
inCity.tooltips.roadGroups.medium.title: Medium roads
inCity.tooltips.roadGroups.large.title: Large roads
inCity.tooltips.roadGroups.highway.title: Highways
inCity.tooltips.stats.title: Stats
inCity.tooltips.wholeCity.title: Whole city
inCity.tooltips.wholeCity.line1: Apply New speed to a road group.
inCity.tooltips.wholeCity.line2: Reset clears custom speeds by type.
inCity.tooltips.wholeCity.line3: Roads, rails, and water clear separately.
inCity.tooltips.wholeCity.line4: Save the city to keep changes.
inCity.tooltips.preciseStepper: Fine tune by 1 unit. Hold to repeat.
inCity.tooltips.slower: Apply 50% lower speed to selection now.
inCity.tooltips.faster: Apply 50% higher speed to selection now.
inCity.tooltips.apply: Apply the new speed to selected segments.
inCity.tooltips.reset: Restore selected segments to game default.
inCity.help.line1: Select a road, rail, or waterway.
inCity.help.line3: Click Apply after setting the slider or number box.
inCity.help.line4: 50% buttons apply immediately to selected segments.
inCity.help.line5: Current is the first segment selected.
inCity.help.line10: Save the city to keep changes.
inCity.help.unitLine:
a = Auto by map
 type NA/EU
inCity.confirm.applyRoadGroup.title: Apply Road Group Speed?
inCity.confirm.applyRoadGroup.messageMid: in the whole city change to
inCity.confirm.applyTrain.title: Apply Train Speed?
inCity.confirm.applyTrain.message: All train track in the whole city changes to
inCity.confirm.applySubway.title: Apply Subway Speed?
inCity.confirm.applySubway.message: All subway track in the whole city changes to
inCity.confirm.resetRoads.title: Reset Custom Road Speeds?
inCity.confirm.resetRoads.message:
Clear this mod's custom speeds from all roads.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
inCity.confirm.resetRails.title: Reset Custom Rail Speeds?
inCity.confirm.resetRails.message:
Clear this mod's custom speeds from all rails.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
inCity.confirm.resetWater.title: Reset Custom Water Speeds?
inCity.confirm.resetWater.message:
Clear this mod's custom speeds from all waterways.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
inCity.confirm.resetAll.title: Reset All Custom Speeds?
inCity.confirm.resetAll.message:
Clear this mod's custom speeds from roads, rails, and waterways.
Save city to keep the reset.
inCity.help.tooltipsOn: Tooltips are ON, click this to turn OFF.
inCity.help.tooltipsOff: Tooltips are OFF for Speed Limits. Click this to turn ON.
inCity.reminder.saveAfterReset: Reset done — SAVE City to keep.
inCity.tooltips.markersHide: Speed numbers are ON. Click to hide the floating numbers on roads.
inCity.tooltips.markersShow: Speed numbers are OFF. Click to show the floating numbers on roads.
